mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coach_course_trend WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY year, month
SELECT * FROM coach_course_trend WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} AND year = #{year} AND month = #{month}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coach_course_trend (coach_id, year, month, course_count, student_count, revenue) VALUES (#{coachId}, #{year}, #{month}, #{courseCount}, #{studentCount}, #{revenue})
